---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CortexPrism
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What are you unable to do today?
     Example: "I need to connect CortexPrism to my internal ticketing system but there's no webhook trigger support." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe what you want to happen. Be as specific as possible.
     Example: "Add a `cortex trigger webhook` command that starts an HTTP listener and fires an agent turn on each incoming request." -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why do you prefer the one above? -->

## Use Case / Example

<!-- Show a concrete example of how this would be used. CLI commands, API calls, config snippets, etc. are all helpful. -->

```bash
# Example usage
cortex ...
```

## Impact

What area of the project does this affect? (check all that apply)

- [ ] New CLI command or flag
- [ ] New built-in tool
- [ ] New LLM provider adapter
- [ ] Web UI change
- [ ] REST API endpoint
- [ ] Memory / embedding system
- [ ] Security / policy system
- [ ] Plugin system
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to open a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with design / specification but not implementation
- [ ] I am just filing the idea

## Additional Context

<!-- Relevant links, prior art, related issues, screenshots, etc. -->
